Risk Register
5×5 Risk Matrix — Click a cell to add a risk at that rating
Impact → ● LOW (1–4) ● MEDIUM (5–9) ● HIGH (10–16) ● CRITICAL (17–25)
I1
Insig.
I2
Minor
I3
Mod.
I4
Major
I5
Catas.
Risk Consequence Thresholds
Level Health & Safety Environmental Legal / Compliance Quality
I1 – Insignificant Report & assessment only. No injury. No impact. Contained within operations area. Prompt cleanup within shift. Single admin exceedance (e.g. late data submission). No regulatory response. Out-of-spec production <1 hr. Minor re-processing.
I2 – Minor First Aid Injury (FAC). Minor impact contained on site. Cleanup within 1 week. Repeat low-impact exceedance. Low-level admin regulatory response. Report within 1 month. Out-of-spec <8 hrs. Return of shipment or sales credit.
I3 – Moderate Medical Treatment Injury (MTC) or Restricted Work Injury (RWI). Moderate impact within lease boundary. Medium-term cleanup (<1 month). Multiple repeat exceedances. Prosecution possible. Notify regulator within 48 hrs. Out-of-spec for 1 week. Loss of minor customer / order cancellation.
I4 – Significant Single Lost Time Injury (LTI) or Permanent Disability. OEL exceedance without PPE. Significant impact extending beyond lease boundary. Significant external cleanup. Recurring exceedances. Prosecution & penalties likely. Threat to license to operate. Out-of-spec 1 month. Loss of major customer. Significant reprocessing.
I5 – Critical Multiple LTIs, Fatality(ies), or serious chronic long-term health effects. PEL/STEL exceedance. Permanent & widespread severe impact to land, water or air. Government suspension of licence. Criminal investigation, jail terms. Licences revoked. Major sustained sanctions. Out-of-spec >1 month. Critical utilisation loss. Loss of market confidence.
Risk Tolerability
CRITICAL (17–25) — Unacceptable · CEO/Board escalation · Urgent action required HIGH (10–16) — Task not performed without Functional Manager approval MEDIUM (5–9) — ALARP · Monitored · Action plan required LOW (1–4) — Acceptable · Routine monitoring

Settings
⚠️ Your Anthropic API key is stored locally in this browser only. Do not use this application on shared or public devices where others may access stored data.
👤 Role-Based Access Control (API-05)

Select your role to enforce function-level authorisation. PII fields, delete actions, and admin functions are restricted by role.

—

⚠ Role is stored locally in this browser. For server-enforced RBAC use Firebase Custom Claims.

Data Management
📧 Email Notifications
Uses EmailJS (free — 200 emails/month). Create a free account → then add a service, create a template, and paste your credentials below.

Template variables to use in your EmailJS template:
{{to_email}}   {{subject}}   {{module}}   {{record_id}}   {{reporter}}   {{date}}   {{location}}   {{description}}   {{priority}}   {{logged_by}}   {{message_html}}
🔒 GDPR — Data Subject Rights (API-07)

Search by name or employee reference to export or erase personal data, or log a Data Subject Access Request (DSAR) with a 30-day SLA.

Log a DSAR
📱 Install App (PWA / Offline Mode)

Install ESG Management Systems - SHEQ on your device for offline access. Once installed, the app will work without an internet connection and sync to Firebase when connectivity is restored.

If the Install button is not visible, open this app in Chrome / Edge and look for the install icon in the address bar.
🔐 Security Audit Log

Last 50 security events for this session. All events are also persisted to Firebase under sheqai/seclog/{uid} for long-term retention. Run sheqSecLog() in the browser console for the full in-memory buffer.

👥 User Management

Users appear here after their first login. Assign roles and deactivate accounts. Role changes take effect on the user's next login.

Click Refresh to load users.

RCA Method: Use 5-Why for simple linear cause chains. Use Fishbone for complex multi-factor incidents. Use Both for high-severity events.
